features: Cleaned up Proof Review KPI/status logic so published proof no longer looks like it skipped approval
Renamed Pending Review KPI/tab language to Needs Review where appropriate
Approved KPI now shows Approved Total with ready + published breakdown
Added Published / Locked KPI count for proof tied to finalized reports
Locked/published proof now displays as Approved + Published instead of only Report Published
Kept approved-but-not-published proof in Approved / Ready so Include in Report remains clear
Preserved row-level Approve/Reject actions for reviewable proof from v3.0.69
Preserved report-published lock behavior and View Report Archive action
Removed duplicate selected proof title rendering in the Proof Review detail rail
